name: Birch River Collab
description:
Yes, yes, we all hate announcements, here is one anyways.

So I ́m starting a new series located in a small town in Canada, everybody knows everybody, small family owned businesses, boy & girl next door vibe, harsh winters were people have to help each other out and stuff like that.

I thought it could be a good place to showcase differences between people who just moved there vs. families that have been living there forever and also folks who keep their front yard spotless vs. outsiders.

I have a lorebook for that ready, with informations about the little town, interesting places, NPCs and yearly events that will be added to this post. Public of course. So everyone who wants to contribute a character to that can not only use, but add to the lorebook for the character.

I would really, really love if someone would like to join in, I ́ll add the lore book here, and it will also be visible in my further bots for Birch River. To make it easy, the tag will also be #birchriver

Feel free to use the picture here and please join ZipperDee ́s Server for more information <3

Also: please use the script provided with this announcement, since it ́s always updated with all the new characters that are added !
creator: Ishiraya
